title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 8 - Securing Systems
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 8 covers system security fundamentals including strong passwords, encryption, two-factor authentication, and cybersecurity best practices. The lecture is part of Harvard's introductory CS50 course adapted for business audiences and is available through edX with certificate options.
